text:
Rumbling is the name of the event that caused the destruction of almost all life on earth through the marching of Karl Fritz's Wall Titans. Other articles with this name include:

Rumbling (Anime) - The anime version of the aforementioned event.
The Rumbling (Chapter) - The 131st chapter of the Attack on Titan manga.
The Rumbling (Episode) - The 88th episode of the Attack on Titan anime.
The Rumbling (Song) - The 7th opening theme of the Attack on Titan anime.
